series_metadata.series_title: Child Support Payment Central Project File
series_metadata.series_description: Records include documentation of the development and ongoing management of the child support payment central project. Includes project proposals and bid documentation, a copy of the current contract for processing support payments, any amendments to the contract, copies of invoices, planning documents and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: ; Paper: in office 2 years and 3 years in records center. provided state and federal audits are complete, audit reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved. Also, review by State Archives possible retention or destruction
